# Session Switch

<!-- Generated by proofd. Rule ID: session-switch. Do not edit manually. -->
<!-- Default Prefix: SS | Prefixes: SS -->

- [SS-01] Inspector detects session switches (plan-mode fork, /resume, compaction) via SessionRegistration event carrying the new sessionId. The useTapEventProcessor compares incoming sessionId against current and fires handleSessionSwitch when they differ.
- [SS-02] Same Bun process, same WebSocket — inspector automatically tracks the new session
